summary: All four upstream bots ran and contributed; coder closed each bot's findings (codeanalyzer F1/F2; tester F1 born-typed decline + F2 temporal operators with 14 landed tests; security F1 fail-closed transport + F2 doc rewrite + regression test that exercises ContextLessFallback.Deserialize on a signed payload and asserts SignatureVerifyContextMissing). Fix at Wire.cs:211-227 cleanly partitions transport (fail-closed) from at-rest Store (trust-on-read, documented, single named SettingsStore todo). All 5 ContextLessFallback call sites re-traced — DecompressAsync is now fail-closed on signed transport, snapshot resume is local-FS-equivalent under PLang's threat model. C# 4166/0 across 6 suites; build clean. Next: Ingi (merge gate).
